user.title: Connect to Meitheal
user.description: Enter your Meitheal addon connection details. If running as an HA addon, the defaults should work.

data_description.host: Docker hostname of the Meitheal addon (auto-discovered at boot, typically 'local-meitheal')
data_description.port: Port the Meitheal web server listens on

hassio_confirm.title: Meitheal Discovered
hassio_confirm.description:
The Meitheal addon was automatically detected at {host}:{port}.

Click **Submit** to finish setup.

After setup, select "Meitheal Tasks" in your conversation agent settings (Settings → Voice Assistants → [Agent] → LLM APIs) to enable voice task management.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Meitheal
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for the Meitheal addon.

data_description.host: Docker hostname of the Meitheal addon
data_description.port: Port the Meitheal web server listens on

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Meitheal addon. Make sure the addon is running.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Meitheal at the specified address. Check that the addon is started and the hostname is correct.

create_task.name: Create Task
create_task.description: Create a new task in Meitheal.

title.name: Title
title.description: The title of the task to create

description.name: Description
description.description: Optional description or notes for the task

complete_task.name: Complete Task
complete_task.description: Mark a task as done by ID or title.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The task ID to complete (use either this or title)

title.name: Title
title.description: Find and complete a task by title (use either this or task_id)

sync_todo.name: Sync Tasks
sync_todo.description: Trigger a manual refresh of task data from Meitheal.

search_tasks.name: Search Tasks
search_tasks.description: Search tasks by keyword. Returns matching tasks from Meitheal.

query.name: Search Query
query.description: Keyword to search in task titles and descriptions

status.name: Status Filter
status.description: Filter by task status (backlog, todo, in_progress, or done)

get_overdue_tasks.name: Get Overdue Tasks
get_overdue_tasks.description: Get a list of all tasks that are past their due date and not yet completed.

notify_overdue.name: Notify Overdue
notify_overdue.description: Push a notification about overdue tasks to HA persistent notifications.

task_not_found.message: Task not found. Make sure the task ID or title is correct.

addon_unavailable.message: Cannot reach the Meitheal addon. Make sure it is running.

addon_unreachable.title: Meitheal addon is unreachable
addon_unreachable.description:
Cannot connect to the Meitheal addon: {error}

Please check:
1. The Meitheal addon is running (Settings → Add-ons → Meitheal)
2. The hostname and port are correct (Settings → Integrations → Meitheal → Configure)
3. The addon container is healthy (`ha addons info local_meitheal`)
